rules.name: Default Heritage Rules
rules.description: Standard parent-heritage name generation. Parent 2 is likely same culture as Parent 1 (70%). First name and surname each drawn 50/50 from either parent's culture.

rules.name: Single Culture
rules.description: Both parents always share the same culture. Names are purely monocultural.

rules.name: Melting Pot
rules.description: Parents are equally likely to be from different cultures. Maximum cultural mixing.

rules.name: Matrilineal
rules.description: Surname always comes from Parent 1's culture. First name from either parent.
